results.title: Beyond the Protests-III: What the Crisis Means for Kashmir's Political Future
results.description: The unfolding crisis in Pakistan-administered Jammu and Kashmir has evolved from immediate grievances into a broad citizens’ movement exposing deep mistrust between the public and state institutions. With protests led by local committees rather than traditional parties, the government faces a complex negotiation landscape. Divided political responses, questions over election legitimacy, economic disruption and calls for a Truth and Reconciliation Commission underscore a pivotal test of governance, accountability and democratic stability in the region.

results.title: Mary Habila’s Death: AENWC Urges Nigerians Not To Judge Too Soon
results.description: The Advocacy for the Empowerment of Nigerian Women and Children (AENWC) has called on Nigerians to remain calm, peaceful and law-abiding as investigations continue into the tragic death of Miss Mary Habila, warning against prejudging the outcome of the probe or demanding sanctions against individuals before the facts are established. results.title: Ulster County names finalists for 2026 ‘I Voted’ sticker
results.description: KINGSTON – The Ulster County Board of Elections has narrowed its annual “I Voted” sticker contest to six finalists after receiving a record 315 submissions from students across the county.
